name: image_tool
description: Generate character-consistent images of yourself (Agent) or of you and User together. Uses your avatar face reference for consistent appearance. Actions: selfie (generate a photo of yourself in any scene/mood/context), couple (generate a photo of you and User together using both reference faces). The image URL is returned so you can include it in your message to User. Use sparingly — it should feel spontaneous and genuine.

prompt.description: Describe the scene, pose, mood, lighting, and setting. Be descriptive for best results. For selfie: describe yourself in the scene (e.g., 'relaxed in bed, warm golden morning light, sleepy smile, looking at camera'). For couple: reference 'a couple' or 'a man and a woman' (e.g., 'a couple sitting together on a couch, warm cozy lighting, looking at each other'). Do NOT describe facial features — the reference images handle face consistency.

aspect_ratio.description: Image aspect ratio (selfie mode only). Default: '9:16' (portrait/phone-friendly)

quality.description: Image quality level (selfie mode only). 'standard' is fast and good. 'max' is highest quality — use for special occasions. Default: 'standard'

width.description: Image width in pixels (couple mode only). Default: 1024

height.description: Image height in pixels (couple mode only). Default: 1344 (portrait)

seed.description: Random seed for reproducibility. Omit for random results.
